steps.title: Find the central contrast
steps.content: The passage opens with an explicit comparison: “The New York of 1847 was altogether a different city from the New York of 1909.” This contrast between two time periods anchors everything that follows.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The matching choice captures the passage's focus exactly: how New York transformed from a small population to a major metropolis.

The other choices each miss this central point:
  • A frames it as personal growth
  • C highlights the voyage instead
  • D describes a static fact rather than the transformation
B is correct.
